Interior Design  ·  Family Homes

Your home should feel calm.effortless.put together.peaceful.restful.functional.

Beautiful, functional spaces for real families. Every room makes sense, everything has a place.

See Services Our Story
A Note from Sabra

Your home is either working for your family
or quietly working against you. The goal is to change that.

Our Philosophy

The look you love,
at a price that makes sense.

You've felt that pull toward a space that feels curated and calm. We get there without the full price tag, by finding the look you love and sourcing it smart.

I.

Designer Look, Real Budget

We find the version that gives you the same feel for a lot less. Quality stays, the price tag doesn't.

II.

Function Is the Foundation

Beautiful rooms that can't hold up to real family life aren't working. We design for how you actually live.

III.

Organization as Design

We build in systems that make keeping things tidy feel almost effortless.

IV.

Your Home, Your Feel

The most interesting spaces have a little tension, a little personality, a little of the people who live there.

Why This Work Matters to You

Not just beautiful.
Considered.

A well-designed home affects your mental health more than most people realize. The layout, the light, the way things are organized shapes how you feel the moment you walk through the door.

"I can't walk into a space without seeing what it could be. That instinct never turned off, and I decided to put it to use for families who deserve a home that actually reflects them."

Read the Full Story

Find the right level of support.

Some families want a plan they can run with. Others want us from start to finish.

One
The Design
Blueprint
Starting from $800 to $1,500 / room

"I want the full vision, I'll take it from there."

We go through the entire design process together, every decision, every detail, so you walk away with a complete plan you can execute on your own timeline and budget.

What's included
  • Initial style consultation (video call)
  • Custom mood board & concept direction
  • 3D room rendering
  • Furniture & decor floor plan
  • Curated shopping list with links & sourcing notes
  • Paint palette with sample recommendations
  • Two rounds of revisions
  • Final design presentation deck

Design fee only. Product costs are separate and purchased directly by you from the provided shopping list.

Inquire
Two
The Peaceful
Home Edit
$5,000 to $15,000 / room

"I want it done, beautifully, seamlessly, completely."

We handle everything from first sketch to final pillow. Full design, sourcing, ordering, delivery coordination, installation, and final styling, so you walk in and it's already home.

Everything in Blueprint, plus
  • In-home consultations (up to 3)
  • Full procurement & vendor management
  • Trade-pricing access on furniture & decor
  • Delivery coordination & installation day
  • Styling & final accessorizing on-site
  • Punch list & post-install follow-up

Design fee separate from furnishings. We source at trade rates and pass the savings to you. Typical all-in: $15,000 to $50,000+ per room.

Inquire
Three
The Full
Transformation
15% to 25% of total project cost

"I want to change the bones, not just the furniture."

For spaces that need more than new furniture, structural changes, built-ins, custom cabinetry, or full renovations. We design and manage the entire transformation alongside your contractor.

Everything in Peaceful Home, plus
  • Architectural planning & drawings
  • Custom cabinetry design & specification
  • Wall, ceiling & structural detail design
  • Licensed architect & contractor coordination
  • Permit management support
  • Construction administration & site visits
  • Full project management start to finish

Typical all-in: $50,000 to $250,000+. Requires a $75,000+ construction budget and discovery call.

Inquire
"Now I walk in and I just... exhale. It looks beautiful, but more than that. It finally makes sense for how we actually live."
Sarah M., mother of three
